(3) Set: Your melee and ranged attacks have a chance to increase your attack speed by 20% and cause your attacks to deal 150 Nature damage. Lasts 8 sec or until you attack 2 times.

(5) Set: Your melee and ranged critical strikes have a 10% chance to call forth a Hippogryph Spirit to fight alongside you for until cancelled. While present, it increases your physical critical damage bonus by 10% and Agility by 10%.

Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"A fierce drake, tamed from the black dragonflight's brood."
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"A steam-powered contraption built for both speed and strength."
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"A graceful black-feathered crane, symbolizing balance and serenity."
Use: Adds a mount to the player's mount collection.
"A rare and beautiful crane with a soft pink plumage."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"A nimble forest crawler, weaving small webs among the leaves to catch morning dew."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Silent and watchful, this spiderling moves carefully through the thorns, ever curious."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Born of flame and stone, its glowing legs light the darkest caves with a gentle warmth."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Bright and quick, it darts through sunlit groves, weaving webs as fine as silk."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"This shy recluse spins intricate webs among fallen timber, blending with the forest floor."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"This little spiderling wishes to weave its own web across the forests of Balor one day."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Dormant arcane energies cause the harmless kitchen spiders to grow to monstrous sizes."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"They may not look like much, but their bite leaves a nasty mark. Luckily their poison is still weak."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"The Night Web spiders adapted and learned how to survive in the cursed stretches of the Tirisfal Glades."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Native to the mines beneath Grim Batol, this hatchling escaped the dark magic of the Dragonmaw sorcerers."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Blessed by Shadra herself, this brood is known for their especially potent venom."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Broodmother Araxxna gave birth to many eight-legged horrors - and this eight-legged sweetie."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"One of the few rare hatchlings of Maexxna, this little one feasts on corpses just like its mother."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"The infamous Darkmist netting is strong enough to web even an ogre. This one, however, can at most catch a rat."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Some of the Sawtooth offspring have found their way into the care of the Sanv Tribe, now being trained to be protectors of the Harborage."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
